en.aboutIntroPanel: Welcome to Sanhuo's site: a place for research, notes, and life, so growth leaves traces.
aboutParagraphs: My interests currently sit at the intersection of LLMs, embodied intelligence, multimodal agents, and robotics. I care about both the research questions and the systems work needed to make ideas testable.

I prefer work that creates a feedback loop between reading, experimentation, implementation, and writing. The goal is not only to finish a project, but to make the reasoning behind it easier to inspect and extend.
interests: Agent memory, planning, and tool use
Research tooling for experiments and technical writing

experience.title: M.S. student
experience.description: Studying embodied intelligence and building a foundation across research and implementation.

experience.title: Independent project work
experience.description: Organizing experiments, notes, demos, and writing into repeatable project records.

education.title: M.S. in Computer Science
education.description: Graduate study focused on embodied intelligence, multimodal agents, and research-oriented engineering practice.

now: Refining this site into a usable long-term research homepage.
Collecting project placeholders that can later become full archives.
Building a writing rhythm around papers, experiments, and project retrospectives.
en.collaboration: Research internships, lab collaboration, technical discussion on embodied agents, and projects where research ideas need careful engineering execution.

zh.role: 面向具身智能的研究与工程实践
zh.aboutIntroPanel: 欢迎来到三火同学的网页：这里记录科研、笔记和生活，让成长留下痕迹。
aboutParagraphs: 我当前的兴趣主要集中在大模型、具身智能、多模态智能体与机器人交叉地带。我既关心研究问题本身，也很在意把想法变成可验证系统时需要的工程细节。
我偏好能形成“阅读 - 实验 - 实现 - 写作”闭环的工作方式。目标不只是做出结果，也希望把背后的判断、取舍与演化过程记录清楚。
interests: 具身智能与机器人学习
视觉语言导航与多模态 grounding
智能体记忆、规划与工具调用
面向实验与技术写作的研究工具链

experience.title: 硕士研究生
experience.description: 围绕具身智能方向建立研究与工程实现的双重基础。

experience.title: 独立项目整理
experience.description: 把实验、笔记、Demo 和技术写作逐步整理成可复用的项目记录。

education.title: 计算机相关方向硕士
education.description: 研究重点放在具身智能、多模态智能体与研究型工程实践。

now: 继续把这个网站打磨成真正能长期使用的研究型个人主页。
把当前的占位项目逐步扩展成完整项目档案页。
建立围绕论文、实验和复盘的稳定写作节奏。
zh.collaboration: 欢迎科研实习、实验室合作、具身智能相关技术交流，以及需要把研究想法和工程实现结合得更紧密的项目。
